name: ai-roundtable
description: Local smoke and live automation for the AI RoundTable Chrome extension.

scripts.test:helpers: node tests/router_presets.test.mjs && node tests/router_review_import.test.mjs && node tests/analysis_provider.test.mjs && node tests/playwright_env.test.mjs && node tests/playwright_runtime.test.mjs && node tests/adapter_watchdog.test.mjs && node tests/chatgpt_adapter.test.mjs && node tests/deepseek_adapter.test.mjs && node tests/doubao_adapter.test.mjs && node tests/manifest_models.test.mjs && node tests/live_backend.test.mjs && node tests/chrome_attach.test.mjs && node tests/extension_smoke_state.test.mjs && node tests/live_workflow.test.mjs
scripts.test:live:core: node scripts/test_live.mjs Gemini Doubao Grok DeepSeek
scripts.test:all: npm run test:helpers && npm run test:smoke:headless
